rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"If a route returns 409 for duplicate submissions, the DB unique constraint must actually exist in the schema — code comments asserting it are not enough.","scope":"Submissions schema"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Quiz submit pattern (getPayload, withAuth, findByID, {success,data}/{success:false,error}) is the canonical reference for entity-submission endpoints in this codebase.","scope":"API route patterns"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"For submission endpoints, always use user.id from the authenticated context (withAuth) rather than studentId from the request body to prevent auth bypass.","scope":"auth/submission routes"}]}
